title: Live tracking NFL free agency: Updates on signings, trades, cuts
content: We're following NFL free agency signings, trades, cuts, contract restructures and other moves as they happen.

title: Barnwell makes sense of Maxx Crosby trade, Ravens' ensuing Trey Hendrickson signing
content: Maxx Crosby was traded to the Ravens, the trade was called off and Baltimore signed Trey Hendrickson.

title: Hurley out after 11 seasons at Arizona State
content: Arizona State will not renew the contract of men's basketball coach Bobby Hurley, the school announced on Wednesday, hours after it was eliminated from the Big 12 tournament in a blowout loss to Iowa State.

title: Cowboys trade DT Odighizuwa to 49ers for pick
content: The Cowboys have traded defensive tackle Osa Odighizuwa to the 49ers in exchange for a 2026 third-round draft pick, and defensive tackle Solomon Thomas to the Titans in a seventh-round pick swap.

title: Ex-Fins OLB Chubb gets 3-year deal with Bills
content: Pass rusher Bradley Chubb reached agreement on a three-year, $43.5 million deal worth up to $52.5 million that includes $29 million guaranteed with the Bills, agent Erik Burkhardt told ESPN's Adam Schefter.

title: Valverde's hat trick dazzles as Madrid dump City
content: Federico Valverde's stellar first-half hat trick was the catalyst as Real Madrid eased past Manchester City 3-0 in the first leg of their Champions League round-of-16 match Wednesday.

title: Court filing: Jackson feared Pearce 'will kill me'
content: WNBA player Rickea Jackson filed a petition for protection against her ex-boyfriend, Falcons player James Pearce Jr., saying she was "in fear of my life" and, if the court didn't intervene, she believed "James will kill me," according to court documents.

title: DT Hargrave stays in NFC North, joins Packers
content: Defensive tackle Javon Hargrave reached agreement Wednesday on a two-year, $23 million contract with the Packers, agent Drew Rosenhaus told ESPN's Adam Schefter.

title: Ex-assistant sues Michigan over Stalions scandal
content: Former Michigan assistant Chris Partridge sued the university, its board and AD Warde Manuel, alleging he was made a "scapegoat"  when he was fired during the Wolverines' 2023 sign-stealing scandal.

title: Chelsea's Neto sorry for shoving PSG ball boy
content: Chelsea's Pedro Neto has apologised after shoving a ball boy late in his team's 5-2 loss to Paris Saint-Germain.

title: 🏆 NFL free agency awards: Best and worst moves
content: The edge rush market exploded, the Titans called on old friends, Mike Evans landed in a new place, and two players were very particular about their contract numbers.

content: The Blue Devils will be missing two key players during the ACC tournament, but will it affect them long term?

content: By moving on from Crosby, Baltimore was still able to land a four-time Pro Bowl pass rusher in Hendrickson.

content: From veterans in new roles to former top prospects ready to reach new heights, here's who we expect to level up.

title: Valverde's hat trick was the cherry on top of Madrid's performance vs. Man City
content: Federico Valverde's hat trick have put Real Madrid in pole position to advance to the Champions League quarterfinals, leaving Manchester City with a huge task at home next week.

content: Mikayla Blakes made sure POY wasn't a one-player race, and Aaliyah Chavez had company in the FOY talk.

title: Avalanche now unbeatable? East contenders whiffed big-time? Judging NHL trade deadline overreactions
content: The final week resulted in a last flurry of trades -- and many hot takes. We identify which takeaways are legit and which are way off base.

content: Heat big man Bam Adebayo just put up the second-highest scoring game in NBA history, with 83 points in a win over the Wizards.

title: Can Brooks Koepka contend? Who are some sleeper picks?
content: From Scottie Scheffler's attempt at a third Players title to how the course is set up to play, we have five big topics to keep an eye on this week.

title: Five questions hanging over F1's new regulations ahead of China
content: The debut of F1's new regulations at the season opener in Australia raised questions, and ESPN answers the five biggest ahead of Sunday's Chinese GP.

title: WNBA CBA negotiations: Talks in 'right direction' after marathon meeting
content: League personnel and WNBPA staff met for nearly 12 hours Tuesday into Wednesday but did not reach a deal on a new collective bargaining agreement.

title: Latest mini NFL mock draft: Yates projects picks 1-10 based on the free agency frenzy
content: How has NFL free agency affected 2026 draft plans? Here are Field Yates' updated predictions for picks Nos. 1-10 after the first wave of deals.

title: Sources: Ravens pivot, agree to add Hendrickson
content: The Ravens have agreed to sign Trey Hendrickson, sources told ESPN, in a high-priced pivot after their canceled blockbuster trade for Maxx Crosby.

title: Sources: Byard, NFL's INTs leader in '25, to Pats
content: Free agent safety Kevin Byard III has agreed to sign with the Patriots on a one-year, $9 million deal, according to NFL Network.

title: Colts, QB Jones agree to 2-year, $88M contract
content: The Colts and quarterback Daniel Jones reached agreement Wednesday on a two-year, $88 million contract that can be worth up to $100 million, his agents told ESPN's Adam Schefter.

title: Sources: Pats land Packers' Doubs on 4-year deal
content: The Patriots have agreed to sign former Packers wide receiver Romeo Doubs to a four-year deal worth up to $80 million, sources told ESPN.

title: Sources: TE Knox stays with Bills on new deal
content: The Bills found a way to keep tight end Dawson Knox on the 2026 roster amid a difficult cap situation by signing him to a new three-year contract, sources told ESPN's Jeremy Fowler on Tuesday.

title: Texans bolster O-line, reach deal with OT Smith
content: Free agent offensive tackle Braden Smith reached agreement with the Houston Texans on a two-year, $25 million contract that includes $13.5 million fully guaranteed, his agent told ESPN's Adam Schefter.

title: Source: WR Raymond leaves Lions to join Bears
content: Kalif Raymond has agreed to sign a one-year contract with the Bears, reuniting the wide receiver with Ben Johnson, a source told ESPN's Jeremy Fowler.

title: Source: LB Lloyd gets $45M deal with Panthers
content: Former Jaguars linebacker Devin Lloyd agreed to a three-year, $45 million deal with the Panthers, a source told ESPN's Adam Schefter on Monday.

title: Tatum's return vaults Celtics, SGA adds distance in MVP race
content: The Celtics are now +550 to win the NBA championship, while Shai Gilgeous-Alexander is distancing himself in MVP race.

title: Ravens tied for second-shortest Super Bowl odds after whirlwind week
content: Every NFL team's team's win total, as well as odds to win their division, the conference and Super Bowl LXI.

title: Is Iran in or out of World Cup? What is Iraq's status for playoffs in Mexico?
content: The ongoing conflict in Iran and neighboring countries has put their participation in the 2026 World Cup in doubt, while Iraq's ability to get to the intercontinental playoff is also in doubt. Here's the latest we know.

title: NWSL ambition rankings: Which teams are raising standards, and which aren't trying enough?
content: The NWSL has teams that are building stadiums, signing stars and spending money. Meanwhile, other teams, well, aren't doing any of that.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Bernardo Silva could join Messi at Inter Miami
content: Manchester City's Bernardo Silva could be joining Lionel Messi at Inter Miami. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Sports Minister Mansukh Mandaviya leads push for F1 revival in India, meets FMSCI officials
content: It is also learnt that the FMSCI has offered to facilitate a meeting between Mr. Mandaviya and the Formula One management, which is headed by former Ferrari team boss Stefano Domenicali

title: Fuel crisis, supply chain disruption, rise in cost of raw material amid West Asia conflict hit Haryana industry
content: Industrialists from key centres across the State, including Hisar, Bahadurgarh and Karnal, have sought the intervention of the State and Union governments to resolve the issue of non-availability of fuel

title: CDSCO issues advisory to prevent misleading promotion of prescription drugs for obesity
content: Activities that exaggerate therapeutic claims, guarantee weight-loss outcomes, or undermine the importance of lifestyle modifications such as diet and physical activity will be treated as misleading promotion

title: Reliance remains mum even as Trump announces ‘historic’ $300 billion U.S. refinery deal
content: The company did not make any announcement neither informed anything to stock exchanges, fuelling speculations on the veracity of U.S. President Trump’s claims

title: Indian, French armies hold expert exchange on precision strike capabilities
content: The engagement between the Indian Army and the French Army is part of a broader defence cooperation between the two countries

title: Piped cooking gas users feel heat of LPG crisis, scramble to stock up
content: Residents of gated communities, high-rises in and around Hyderabad relying on piped LPG are facing the impact of the cooking gas crisis, with housing associations scrambling to replenish cylinder banks

title: Avimukteshwaranand Saraswati announces 81-day march for cow protection
content: The religious leader is commencing the State-wide march weeks after police in Prayagraj registered a case against him on charges of molesting two minors

title: National Conference alleges attempt to kill Farooq Abdullah in Jammu; one detained
content: A man with a loaded pistol got within point-blank range of NC president and opened fire, says J&K CM Omar Abdullah; accused identified as Kamal Singh, a resident of Purani Mandi

title: Consumers flock to LPG agencies as bookings fail
content: As commercial LPG gas cylinder supplies remain dismal, small standalone restaurants have been trying to add wood-fired stoves to their kitchens

title: Raw material prices a cause of concern for industries in Tamil Nadu
content: With global logistics disruptions and volatility in energy-linked commodities, industries across Tamil Nadu are worried about sustaining production and maintaining business operations

title: Kerala HC seeks details of transactions made by priests, workers during Sabarimala season
content: Melsanthi at Malikappuram remitted ₹46.51 lakh and an assistant of the Tantri remitted ₹1.17 lakh at post offices and financial institutions at Sabarimala during the 2025-2026 Mandalam-Makaravilakku season

title: Sales of electric cooktops sizzle as LPG flameout worries families
content: The conflict in West Asia has led to unprecedented demand for the product on e-commerce platforms and retail stores; the prices for induction cooktops have gone up but supplies largely remained available though the inventory is quickly going down

title: West Asia conflict: India hails IEA move to release emergency oil stocks
content: New Delhi said it was closely monitoring the “evolving situation in global energy markets”, and stands ready to take “appropriate measures, as necessary”

title: VMC council discusses need for EV charging stations, drain works
content: MLA Bonda Umamaheswara Rao proposal to set up EV public charging stations in the corporation limits got approval

title: Uptake of induction stoves sluggish in low-income Indian households
content: While a small minority of Indian households use induction cooktops, only 5% of Indian households had ‘electric penetration’ in their kitchens, say experts

title: Recent rise in deaths, property damage due to building collapses: Union Home Secretary
content: Almost two-thirds of the country is prone to earthquakes, says Home Secretary, adds that rapid urbanisation has increased the chance of casualties and property damage

title: Next instalment of Kisan Nidhi to reach farmers on March 13
content: “In the 22nd instalment, over 2.15 crore women farmers will receive financial assistance,” says Agriculture Minister Shivraj Singh Chouhan

title: Parliament likely to take up Bill to codify IPS deputation in CAPFs this session
content: The Bill intends to codify the functioning of the Central Armed Police Forces (CAPFs) and is in response to a May 2025 Supreme Court ruling that asked the Ministry of Home Affairs (MHA) to “progressively reduce” the deputation of IPS officers

title: "Don't Want To Leave Early": Trump Vows To "Finish The Job" In Iran
content: President Donald Trump said Wednesday that the United States must "finish the job" in Iran -- hours after suggesting the war could be over soon because Washington had run out of targets.

title: "Serious Threat To Peace": UN Demands Iran Stop Attacks On Gulf Nations
content: The UN Security Council on Wednesday passed a resolution calling for Iran to immediately halt its attacks on Gulf states, saying they breach international law and pose a "serious threat to international peace and security."

title: Iran Adviser To Khamenei Calls Trump "Satan Himself", Vows To Destroy Israel
content: A senior military adviser to Iran's Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei insulted US President Donald Trump and vowed to destroy Israel in remarks to state television on Wednesday, as their countries wage a war that has engulfed the Middle East.

title: Epstein's Longtime Accountant Testifies On His Wealth, Business Ties
content: House lawmakers were digging into Jeffrey Epstein's sprawling financial portfolio on Wednesday as a committee deposed his former accountant and tried to understand his connections to some of the world's wealthiest men.

title: Iran Military Says Will Hit US, Israeli Economic Targets In Region
content: Iran's military vowed on Wednesday to launch strikes against US and Israeli economic targets in the region, including banks, after overnight attacks hit an Iranian bank.

title: Ensuring Those Stranded Could Return Safely: India's UAE Envoy To NDTV
content: The envoy said the situation became particularly difficult when tensions escalated on February 28 as Iran's supreme leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, was killed in a joint US and Israeli air strikes.

title: Iran-Israel War LIVE Updates: Energy Body Says Members To Release 400 Million Barrels From Oil Reserves
content: US-Israel-Iran War Live Updates: Iran launched fresh missiles and drones at targets across the Gulf, including oil infrastructure in Saudi Arabia and a ship off the coast of the Emirates.

title: Winston Churchill To Be Replaced By Wildlife In English Banknotes
content: According to a stinging barb from Donald Trump, Britons are being led by a Prime Minister who is no Winston Churchill. Soon they will have to cope without the popular wartime leader on their banknotes too.

title: Ghalib To Shakespeare: Supreme Court's Tryst With "Right To Die With Dignity"
content: Back in 2011, while deciding the Aruna Shanbaug's euthanasia plea, the Supreme Court had invoked Mirza Ghalib's couplet: "Marte hain aarzoo mein marne ki, Maut aati hai par nahin aati".

title: Video: Iranian Drones Strike Oil Storage Tanks In Oman's Salalah Port
content: A series of drone strikes targeted fuel storage tanks at Oman's Salalah port. While the British maritime security firm Ambrey confirmed the strikes on the infrastructure, they noted that there was no damage to merchant vessels.

title: Trump To Back Israeli-Led Killing Of Mojtaba If He Does Not Cooperate: Report
content: US President Donald Trump has said that he would support the assassination of Iran's new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei if he does not cooperate with US demands, according to a report by the Wall Street Journal.

title: Centre Reviews LPG Supply Situation At High-Level Meet With States
content: Amid concerns over the availability of cooking gas amid the Middle East war, the Centre has held a high-level meeting with States and Union Territories to review the LPG supply situation and ensure smooth distribution across the country.

title: Amid LPG shortage, Bengaluru PGs Told To Ban Dosa, Chapathi, Poori
content: An advisory has been issued by PG Owners Welfare Association, Bengaluru, urging paying guest accommodation owners to adopt temporary gas conservation measures in view of a shortage in LPG and commercial gas supply.

title: Induction Cooktops Go Out Of Stock Online As LPG Concerns Push Demand
content: Demand for induction cooktops has increased across India due to worries about LPG cylinder availability in several cities. A check by NDTV on major online platforms reveals that many induction cooktops are now out of stock.

title: Amid Bombs, Smoke, Black Rain, Tehran's Air Still Cleaner Than Delhi's
content: Tehran's air quality registered in the "good to moderate" range on Wednesday, with readings between 32 and 67 on the Air Quality Index (AQI).

title: Speaker Om Birla To Address Lok Sabha After No Confidence Motion Rejected
content: The no-confidence motion against him rejected, Om Birla is expected to return to the Speaker's chair in the Lok Sabha and address the House, a development that comes amid heightened tensions between the government and the opposition.

title: "Told To Carry Passports To Bomb Shelters": Indian In Israel Amid Iran War
content: As missiles streak across the skies of the Middle East and the war between the US, Israel and Iran shows no signs of slowing, anxiety is mounting among Indian workers stranded in Israeli cities.

title: Rs 20,000 Crore Crypto Scam Accused Arrested While Trying To Flee To Sri Lanka
content: The Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) has made the first arrest in what is believed to be one of India's biggest cryptocurrency scams, involving an alleged Rs 20,000 crore Bitcoin fraud.

title: LPG Production Up 25%, Government Says Amid Shortage Reports
content: There has been a 25 per cent increase in the production of cooking gas and there is no need for panic buying, the government said today amid reports of hotels and restaurants shutting down across the country.

title: US Missile Struck Iran School Due To 'Targeting Error': Report
content: The United States is responsible for the strike on the elementary school in Iran's Minab that killed over 175 people, mostly children, according to a report by the New York Times.

title: Kings of Command: Nine fantasy breakout pitchers to draft late
content: Which overlooked pitchers have the skills to come up with a big season? Tristan H. Cockcroft presents his annual look at MLB's "Kings of Command."

content: Karabell identifies the players unlikely to be on his roster this season due to too much risk, too much hype.

content: Your one-stop shop for fantasy football reaction to all the key player movement via free agency and trades.

title: Boxing divisional rankings: Jai Opetaia keeps top spot and claims new title
content: Jai Opetaia beat Brandon Glanton to keep his No. 1 spot at cruiserweight. Here are the latest ESPN divisional rankings.

content: Widespread changes being proposed to scholarship schemes run by Social Justice and Tribal Affairs Ministries; plan underway to name overseas scholarship scheme for SCs after Dr. Ambedkar

title: Karnataka High Court notice on plea against scheme for regularising ‘illegal’ digital advertisement hoardings
content: Characterising these hoardings as ‘visual pollution’, the petitioner says this amounts to infringement of the right to the environment

title: Speaker forced to act according to government wishes: Opposition in Lok Sabha
content: Congress MP K.C. Venugopal says the Speaker had repeatedly barred Leader of Opposition Rahul Gandhi from speaking in the House; Parliamentary Affairs Minister says he has never witnessed such misbehaviour from MPs in front of a Speaker

title: LPG cylinder shortage: Bengaluru hotels switch to induction, kerosene stoves
content: In an attempt to keep their kitchens running, many restaurants in Bengaluru have turned to alternatives such as kerosene stoves, induction cooktops.

title: India must diversify energy sources as oil markets turn volatile, says former Deputy NSA Pankaj Saran
content: Mr. Saran warns of the long-term impact of a sustained rise in crude prices on India’s current account deficit and balance of payments, as well as on inflation and economic growth

title: Supreme Court judge distinguishes between active and passive euthanasia
content: The judge characterised active euthanasia as causing death by introducing a new, external agency of harm, such as a lethal injection. Conversely, he explained that passive euthanasia should be understood as allowing death to occur.

title: Exclusion of Kerala Public Works Minister from PM’s event stokes political controversy
content: CPI(M) organises a parallel inauguration of the two road stretches of NH 66 before Prime Minister inaugurated it

title: Raichur bandh call seeking internal quota for SCs gets good response
content: Shops, commercial establishments, petrol bunks and business centres remain closed, while bus services, autos, private vehicles stay off roads

title: New EPS rules leave out clause on higher pension
content: EPFO board describes as obsolete the clause that provided a maximum of one year to  employers and employees to exercise the higher pension option by making contributions above the wage cap of ₹15,000 every month

title: When it comes to us, the most common word used by Speaker is ‘no’, says Opposition
content: Rashtriya Janata Dal member Abhay Kumar Sinha said the Speaker’s office had strayed from the neutrality envisioned by the framers of the Constitution.

title: Opposition blames PM Modi’s foreign policy for fuel crisis in rural India
content: CPI(M)’s V. Sivadasan says the PM being a friend of U.S. President Donald Trump has not solved the crisis. AAP leader Sanjay Singh asks where the Prime Minister is hiding when country is standing in queue

title: LPG crisis fuels fear of loss of livelihood, food scarcity in Kerala
content: Slackening availability of commercial LPG cylinders has pushed small-scale entrepreneurs to the brink in Kerala, with many facing indefinite closure

title: Right to dignified death prevails over interest of the state: Supreme Court
content: The Supreme Court upheld the withdrawal of life support to a 32-year-old man in a persistent vegetative state for over 12 years

title: Fire destroys plastic pipes in Amaravati
content: Home Minister Vangalapudi Anitha orders an inquiry to determine wether it was an accident or a conspiracy

title: Civilians held captive, fresh tension in Manipur’s Ukhrul
content: Chief Minister Yumnam Khemchand Singh directs senior police and administrative officials to secure the release of the people who were travelling on the Ukhrul-Imphal Road

title: Mamata holds review meeting on LPG crisis, calls for SOP and rationing of cylinders
content: People were seen crowding the offices of distribution agencies. Many complained that they have run out of LPG and cannot book a refill. Some schools said that they have no LPG to cook mid-day meals

title: Chief Minister to inaugurate Pallivasal extension scheme on Thursday
content: He will also officially inaugurate the Golden Jubilee celebrations of the Idukki Hydroelectric Project, the State’s largest power project

title: Notice on ‘operational limitations’ put up inside Government Medical College Hospital Pathanamthitta causes embarrassment
content: The notice posted on the walls at the Surgery wing of the hospital stated that patients coming for surgery should be aware of the hospital’s limitations

title: Non-Sanatanis may not enter Badrinath, Kedarnath temples: Badri-Kedar Temple Committee
content: Anyone who has faith in Sanatan Dharma is a Sanatani; anyone who applies vermillion on the forehead and can recite the Chalisa is a Sanatan, says BKTC chairman

title: AIDSO to organise Nammura Shaale Ulisi meet in Kalaburagi on Saturday
content: It comes amid growing concern over the State govt.’s proposal to establish Karnataka Public Schools by closing down government schools

title: Prime Minister Modi launches NDA’s poll campaign in Kerala
content: At Kochi, the PM draws parallels between LDF regime and earlier UDF Government, saying both the fronts were partners in corruption, committing crimes, spreading communalism, stonewalling development projects and closing down of industrial units

title: Kodikunnil lodges complaint with Lok Sabha Speaker over stone-laying ceremony ‘snub’
content: MP flags ‘serious protocol violation’ in connection with the stone laying ceremony of a 50 MW floating solar power project

title: SVIMS ‘Pink Bus’ screens 42,000 rural women for cancer
content: Screening camp organised at the Community Health Centre at Naravaripalle, the Chief Minister’s ancestral village

title: Ongole GGH holds mock drill to test mass casualty response
content: Hospital staff simulate road accident scenario and activate Orange Alert to assess rapid response and coordination with 108 ambulance services

title: Tobacco auctions halted again as farmers protest sharp fall in prices
content: Apart from the tax burden, sources in the tobacco industry say geopolitical tensions could also be affecting procurement

title: Kadapa MP seeks new railway line to boost local economy
content: Avinash Reddy urges Railways to act on Andhra Pradesh’s proposal to link Pulivendula, Muddanur and Puttaparthi, citing connectivity to cement plants and the Kopparthi industrial estate

title: Andhra Pradesh explores Artificial Intelligence-based cultural tourism initiatives
content: Tourism Department and Eros Innovation decide to work together to explore technological partnerships that connect culture, digital innovation, and tourism

title: I&B Ministry directs Telegram to remove over 3,100 channels for hosting copyright-protected content
content: Telegram is fully compliant with applicable Indian laws,” Remi Vaughn, a Telegram spokesperson, told The Hindu

title: Close shave for Farooq Abdullah: Man aims gun at ex-J&K CM, pinned down in time - CCTV footage
content: A man opened fire at the cavalcade of former Jammu and Kashmir chief minister Farooq Abdullah and Deputy CM Surinder Choudhary. Both leaders escaped unhurt as security personnel deflected the shot and apprehended the assailant. The accused, reportedly under the influence of alcohol, is being interrogated.

title: USCIS issues 'alert', shares details of the form it will reject starting April 1
content: USCIS has updated Form I-129, effective April 1, 2026, requiring employers to detail educational and experience requirements for H-1B visa applicants. This change aims to align with the Department of Labor's wage level assignments and verify consistency between the Labor Condition Application and the registration process, impacting the upcoming FY27 H1B cap season.

title: Indian man's daring desert escape to Riyadh to flee Doha amid Iran vs US-Israel war
content: An Indian traveller, Varun Krishnan, abandoned waiting for flights in Doha and embarked on a desert road journey to Saudi Arabia due to escalating Iran vs US-Israel conflict. His dramatic escape highlights the widespread travel chaos, with thousands stranded as airspace closures disrupt global aviation. Krishnan's resourceful overland trip underscores the vulnerability of modern travel networks to geopolitical shocks.

title: Amazon to FCC: Reject application of Musk's SpaceX for Space data centers
content: Amazon's Project Kuiper has urged the FCC to reject SpaceX's ambitious one million-satellite proposal. Citing a lack of crucial technical and safety details, Amazon argues the plan is speculative, could take centuries to deploy, and poses significant risks to orbital space. The filing highlights concerns over interference, collision avoidance, and the sheer unrealistic scale of SpaceX's vision.

title: Cargo ship-bound for Kandla port catches fire after Iran attack, 20 rescued, 3 missing
content: An India-bound Thai cargo vessel was among four ships attacked in the Strait of Hormuz, with the ship heading for Gujarat's Kandla port catching fire. The Indian government deplored the targeting of commercial shipping, emphasizing the need to avoid impeding freedom of navigation and commerce.

title: Amazon orders 90-day reset, what new policy means for engineers and other top leaders
content: Amazon is tightening its code review and deployment rules for engineers following recent major outages, some linked to AI tools. A 90-day safety reset mandates dual reviews for changes to critical systems. This move comes after incidents caused millions in lost orders, prompting a top-down audit of code management practices.

title: Alysa Liu questions father Arthur Liu’s anger over Team USA comeback
content: Team USA figure skater Alysa Liu shared honest feelings about her father Arthur Liu while discussing her return to skating in a March 7 interview with Rolling Stone. After retiring in 2022 and coming back in 2024, Liu said she wanted the decision to be fully hers. Past pressure and strict training shaped how she now approaches the sport.

title: Jeffree Star exposes Stefon Diggs’ alleged DMs, drags Cardi B and Nicki Minaj feud
content: Tensions flared as Jeffree Star claimed Cardi B's baby daddy, Stefon Diggs, contacted him, escalating the Cardi-Nicki feud. Star sided with Nicki Minaj, criticizing Cardi's relationship choices amid Diggs' sexual assault allegations. This online drama highlights celebrity loyalty and the rapid spread of private disputes in the digital age, with Diggs' situation unlikely to cool down soon.

title: Connor McDavid one scoring title away from redefining his NHL legacy
content: Edmonton's Connor McDavid is on the cusp of hockey history, chasing a sixth Art Ross Trophy to tie legends like Gretzky. With a slim lead over Nathan MacKinnon and Nikita Kucherov, this tight scoring race could be decided by who plays the most in the final weeks. McDavid's potential sixth title solidifies his offensive dominance.

title: Expats alert: Dubai tightens housing rules, shared apartment violations may cost Dh1 million fines
content: Dubai has enacted a stringent new law to regulate shared housing, imposing hefty fines up to Dh500,000 for violations and Dh1 million for repeat offenders. This move targets overcrowding and unsafe "bed-space" rentals, aiming to balance affordability with strict safety and quality standards in the booming property market. The regulation mandates permits for all shared accommodations, ensuring compliance and transparency.

title: ElonTrades’s Dubai rant goes viral amid Iran vs US-Israel war
content: A crypto trader's viral tweet about needing a social media permit in Dubai has ignited debate. While framed as bureaucracy, experts clarify that the new UAE regulations target promotional content and influencer marketing, aiming for transparency and professionalisation. This reflects a global trend of governments regulating the burgeoning digital advertising landscape.

title: Gunmen abduct 20 Naga people from three vehicles in Manipur
content: Naga men, women, and children were abducted by suspected militants along Manipur's Ukhrul-Imphal Road, potentially escalating ethnic tensions. A Naga organization blamed Kuki militants, demanding their immediate release. The Manipur Chief Minister appealed for the unconditional release of all civilians and urged stakeholders to maintain peace.

title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Iran refuses to play; Trump rolls out welcome mat anyway
content: Iran's sports minister declared the nation will not participate in the 2026 FIFA World Cup, citing the US "assassination" of their leader and recent "malicious actions." This follows similar sentiments from the Iranian Football Federation president. FIFA's president had previously stated the Iranian team would be welcomed in the US, which is co-hosting the tournament.

title: Dhurandhar's Rakesh Bedi reacts to resemblance with Pak minister; speaks on Toxic release shift
content: Veteran actor Rakesh Bedi, who plays the cunning politician Jameel Jamali in the Dhurandhar franchise, has responded to a controversy after Pakistani politician Nabil Gabol reportedly claimed that the character resembles him. As Bedi prepares for the release of the sequel Dhurandhar: The Revenge, the actor clarified that the role was not modelled on any specific individual. He also spoke about Yash’s Toxic: A Fairy Tale for Grown-Ups being postponed from its earlier release date.

title: India prepares for its biggest headcount: What makes Census 2027 different
content: India gears up for Census 2027, a comprehensive, paper-free digital headcount after a decade-long delay. This exercise will include caste enumeration for the first time since 1931 and will be crucial for Lok Sabha delimitation, potentially impacting women's reservation. The digital approach aims for efficiency and transparency.

title: Anti-Muslim hostility definition unfair on other faiths, say Hindu and Sikh groups
content: Hindu and Sikh groups are challenging the UK government's new definition of anti-Muslim hostility and the appointment of an 'Islamophobia tsar'. They argue it fosters resentment and marginalizes other faiths, demanding equal treatment and consultation. Concerns are raised about potential free speech curtailment and the downplaying of attacks on Hindu communities.

title: Trump says Iran war could stop ‘soon’; claims US has little left to target
content: US President Trump declared the war with Iran could end soon, claiming significant damage to Tehran's military. He stated US forces are ahead of schedule, having destroyed Iranian mine-laying boats in the Strait of Hormuz. Despite his optimism, US and Israeli officials indicate preparations for further strikes continue, with Iran vowing to block oil shipments.

title: Arctic sea ice heading for one of lowest winter peaks on record: Report
content: Arctic sea ice is nearing a historic low winter peak. This trend signals accelerating global warming. The shrinking ice threatens polar ecosystems and wildlife. It also opens new shipping routes and resource access. This is reshaping geopolitical competition in the region. Nations are increasing activity as the Arctic transforms.

title: Dhurandhar's song FA9LA rapper Flipperachi cancels India show amid Middle East tensions
content: Flipperachi, the Bahraini rapper who gained popularity in India after his track FA9LA featured in the spy thriller Dhurandhar, will no longer be performing at the upcoming UN40 Music & Beyond Festival in India due to the ongoing situation in the Middle East.

title: IPL 2026 team-wise full schedule: Complete list of matches, dates, time and venues
content: The Indian Premier League 2026 kicks off on March 28 with Royal Challengers Bengaluru facing Sunrisers Hyderabad. The BCCI announced the schedule for the first phase, covering 20 matches across 10 venues until April 12. The full schedule awaits clearance due to upcoming state assembly elections.

title: Counting cost of Trump's war on Iran: Is US fighting a billion-dollar-a-day conflict?
content: Operation Epic Fury, now in its twelfth day, is costing the US an estimated $1 billion to $2 billion daily. Is this massive military expenditure involving extensive deployments and advanced weaponry raising concerns in Washington?

title: Explained: What is Iran’s black-clad NOPO force guarding Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei?
content: Iran's elite NOPO counterterrorism unit is reportedly guarding newly appointed Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei after his father's assassination. This highly specialized force, known for its ruthlessness, was deployed following a US-Israeli strike that killed Ali Khamenei.

title: Kumbh Mela girl Monalisa Bhosle marries beau Farman Khan in Kerala after seeking police help
content: Monalisa Bhosle, who shot to internet fame during the Kumbh Mela in Prayagraj, has married her boyfriend Farman Khan in Kerala after approaching the police following opposition from her family. The couple tied the knot at the Nainar Temple.

title: Karnataka govt weighs 1 airport for 3 districts after Udan setback
content: Karnataka government is considering a single airport for Ballari, Vijayanagara, and Koppal districts due to mixed results of the Centre's Udan scheme. Infrastructure Minister MB Patil highlighted struggles of regional airports post-Udan support, aiming to avoid a 'white elephant' project. The state is examining a viable model for the Kalyana Karnataka region, with land already acquired for a Ballari airport.

title: Big revelation! 'MS Dhoni never said drop Yuvraj Singh': Former selector
content: Former chief selector Sandeep Patil has refuted claims by Yograj Singh that MS Dhoni was responsible for Yuvraj Singh's ouster from the Indian team. Patil stated on record that Dhoni never requested Yuvraj's exclusion and fully trusted the selection committee's decisions. He acknowledged a father's emotions but emphasised the blame was misplaced.

title: Opposition to submit notice to Parliament this week to seek motion for CEC’s removal
content: the notice will be submitted to the Speaker of Lok Sabha and Chairman Rajya Sabha through the secretary generals of the respective Houses . the nearly half a dozen charges in the notice seeking removal range from partisan conduct of the CEC to mass disenfranchisement of voters .

title: LPG shortage may force production halt in Chennai industrial corridors
content: manufacturing units across key industrial corridors warn they may be forced to shut operations if the LPG shortage persists for seven to 10 days more . any disruption in supply of LPG can hit production schedules, particularly for MSME suppliers that form a vital part of OEM supply chains . leading OEMs have begun drawing up contingency plans .

title: 'Negative image': SC imposes life ban on 3 academics for 'corruption in judiciary' chapter
content: the supreme court imposed a life ban on three academics . they were responsible for "projecting a negative image of judiciary" the court also said it would take stringent action against social media "mischief mongers"

title: 'Non-Sanatanis' barred from Badrinath and Kedarnath temples

title: Men's Bubble Watch: NC State, Iowa, UCF strengthen bubble cases
content: we're tracking how each team on the "bubble" of the bracket is trending using a variety of metrics as guides . we'll class them based on how likely they are to make the field of 68 as one of the 37 at-large selections . the selection committee will evaluate teams that have nearly a 100% chance to be called .

title: Updated 2026 NBA mock draft: Who's rising and falling ahead of March Madness?
content: Jeremy Woo previews his latest mock draft and looks at the biggest names to watch in the big 12 . a terrific group of guard prospects add significant depth to the mid-lottery . the strength of this draft has certainly played a role in the unusually high number of teams tumbling down the standings .

title: The ACC's most important newcomers and what their teams are saying
content: a wave of new faces reshape the ACC every season . the addition of Malachi Toney via the high school ranks and timely portal additions such as Carson Beck helped springboard the Hurricanes to the college football playoff title game in 2025 .

title: PSG are still Champions League faves, and ruthless win vs. Chelsea shows why
content: arsenal drew 1-1 in their champions league first leg clash with bayer leverkusen . a mistake by goalkeeper Filip Jorgensen gifted a 2-2 draw at paris saint-Germain . it was a season of inconsistency and ups-and-downs for the reigning champions .

title: Bilas' All-America teams: My top 20 men's college basketball players of 2025-26
content: the quality of play has been spectacular . the only downer of the season has been the high-profile injuries to some of the truly great players in the game . phenom darryn Peterson has been, at times, the best .

title: Ranking the top 25 players in the field
content: the PGA Tour is heading to The Players, its flagship event at the 123-man field . the players has a $25 million purse, with $4.5 million and 750 FedEx Cup points going to the winner . defending champion Rory McIlroy defeated J.J. Spaun in a Monday playoff last year .
